meta_description: Daksh Sengar is a developer specialized in AI & Machine Learning, based in Greater Noida, India. Skilled in Python, Data Science, Web Development and Research.
bento_one_paragraph: I write clean Python scripts to parse, clean, and analyze datasets. Using NumPy and Pandas, I build reliable data processing pipelines that extract clear, useful metrics.
bento_two_paragraph: Developing and fine-tuning predictive models. I focus on training classifiers, recognizing patterns in unstructured data, and applying ML algorithms to solve concrete problems.
bento_three_paragraph: Building fast, fully responsive interfaces. I write simple, standard-compliant HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, deploying production-ready frontends that work perfectly on any screen.
bento_four_paragraph: Exploring new AI methodologies, studying research papers, and keeping a detailed journal of my ML experiments to understand how models function under the hood.
bento_five_paragraph: Using Git/GitHub for version control, Jupyter for prototyping, and systems languages like C and Java (OOP) alongside Raspberry Pi hardware for integrations.
bento_six_paragraph: Developing intelligent systems combining OpenCV and YOLO for real-time threat detection, alongside Raspberry Pi and sensor integrations.
